gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tph1/enable.snippet: Panel E: gene label 'tph-1' above the ADF neuron (blue triangle) inside the NEURONS compartment.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/ser6/enable.snippet: Panel E: gene label 'ser-6' above the AWB neuron (green triangle) inside the NEURONS compartment.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/mod1/enable.snippet: Panel E: gene label 'mod-1' above the URX neuron (yellow hexagon) inside the NEURONS compartment.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tbh1/enable.snippet: Panel E: gene label 'tbh-1' above the RIC neuron (red hexagon) inside the NEURONS compartment.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/nhr76/enabl.snippet: Panel E: first node 'nhr-76' inside the INTESTINE compartment, connected by a solid arrow to ATGL.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/atgl1/enabl.snippet: Panel E: middle node 'ATGL' inside the INTESTINE compartment; receives activation from nhr-76 and points to 'β-oxidation / Fat loss'.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tph1/molecu.snippet: tph-1 annotated to tryptophan 5-monooxygenase activity (IBA) — rate-limiting enzyme of serotonin biosynthesis.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tph1/part_o.snippet: tph-1 annotated to serotonin biosynthetic process (IBA); produces the 5-HT signal shown on the ADF→URX arrow.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tph1/occurs.snippet: tph-1 annotated to neuron projection (IBA); figure places it in the ADF neuron.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/ser6/molecu.snippet: ser-6 annotated to octopamine receptor activity (IDA); matches the octopamine ('Oct') input from RIC/tbh-1 in the figure.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/ser6/part_o.snippet: ser-6 annotated to octopamine signaling pathway (IDA).

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/ser6/occurs.snippet: ser-6 (GPCR) annotated to plasma membrane; figure places it in the AWB neuron.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/mod1/molecu.snippet: mod-1 annotated to serotonin-gated chloride channel activity (IDA); matches the serotonin ('5-HT') input from ADF/tph-1 in the figure.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/mod1/part_o.snippet: mod-1 annotated to serotonin receptor signaling pathway (IDA/IMP).

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/mod1/occurs.snippet: mod-1 (ligand-gated chloride channel) annotated to plasma membrane (IDA); figure places it in the URX neuron.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tbh1/molecu.snippet: tbh-1 annotated to tyramine-beta hydroxylase activity (IMP/ISS/IBA); final enzyme of octopamine biosynthesis.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tbh1/part_o.snippet: tbh-1 annotated to octopamine biosynthetic process (IMP); produces the octopamine ('Oct') signal on the RIC→AWB arrow.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tbh1/occurs.snippet: tbh-1 annotated to synapse (IDA); figure places it in the RIC neuron.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/nhr76/molec.snippet: nhr-76 annotated to nuclear receptor activity (IBA); ligand-activated DNA-binding transcription factor.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/nhr76/part_.snippet: nhr-76 annotated to positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II (IMP); activates target gene (ATGL) transcription.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/nhr76/occur.snippet: nhr-76 annotated to nucleus (IEA/IBA); figure places it in the INTESTINE.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/atgl1/molec.snippet: atgl-1/ATGL annotated to triacylglycerol lipase activity (ISS/IBA); catalyzes lipolysis driving fat loss.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/atgl1/part_.snippet: atgl-1/ATGL annotated to triglyceride catabolic process (IBA); captures the figure's 'β-oxidation / Fat loss' downstream leaf (ATGL hydrolyzes TAG, releasing fatty acids for β-oxidation).

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/atgl1/occur.snippet: atgl-1/ATGL annotated to lipid droplet (IDA/EXP); figure places it in the INTESTINE.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tph1/causal.snippet: Integrated serotonin/octopamine circuit controlling body fat (Noble, Stieglitz & Srinivasan 2013). Panel E solid arrow labelled '5-HT': serotonin synthesized by tph-1 in ADF activates the serotonin-gated chloride channel MOD-1 in URX. tph-1 product is causally upstream, positive effect, of mod-1; intermediate = serotonin (5-HT).

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/tbh1/causal.snippet: Noble, Stieglitz & Srinivasan 2013. Panel E solid arrow labelled 'Oct': octopamine synthesized by tbh-1 in RIC acts on the octopamine receptor SER-6 in AWB. tbh-1 product is causally upstream, positive effect, of ser-6; intermediate = octopamine (Oct).

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/ser6/causal.snippet: Panel E: solid pointed arrow from AWB (ser-6) up to ADF (tph-1), read as ser-6 octopamine-receptor signaling positively promoting tph-1 serotonin synthesis. ser-6 product causally upstream, positive effect, of tph-1. NOTE: curator-intent confidence 0.3 — flagged 'unconfirmed against figure in verification'; verify the arrow's existence/direction.

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/mod1/causal.snippet: Panel E: dashed pointed arrow from URX (mod-1) down toward RIC (tbh-1). Dashed = indirect; pointed arrowhead read as positive. mod-1 indirectly positively regulates tbh-1. Sign inferred from arrowhead (no T-bar); confirm in text.

Noble, Stieglitz & Srinivasan 2013 show the neuronal circuit triggers release of a long-range endocrine signal that acts on the intestine to control body fat. Panel E: dashed arrow labelled 'endocrine signal' from URX to INTESTINE. Modeled as the most upstream intestinal activity: mod-1 (URX) indirectly positively regulates nhr-76 (intestine) via a circulating endocrine signal (long-range, mechanism/identity not specified).

gomodel:run-figure1-perclaim/nhr76/causa.snippet: Panel E: solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL inside the INTESTINE. nhr-76 is a nuclear hormone receptor (DNA-binding TF), so it activates ATGL via transcription/translation — an INDIRECT step. nhr-76 indirectly positively regulates atgl-1/ATGL triacylglycerol lipase activity.
